heading: Enterprise for the Americas environmental funds
label: 1738g Enterprise for the Americas environmental funds

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: An eligible country shall, under the terms of an environmental framework agreement entered into under , establish an Environmental Fund to receive payments in local currency pursuant to .section 1738f of this titlesection 1738f(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Investment
children.label: b Investment
children.text: Amounts deposited into an Environmental Fund shall be invested until disbursed. Notwithstanding any other provision of law, any return on such investment may be retained by the Environmental Fund and need not be deposited to the account of the Commodity Credit Corporation and may be retained without further appropriation by Congress.
